title: SEYMAC stock Case for iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation 10.2'' with Screen Protector, 360° Rotating Stand, Pencil Holder & Shoulder Strap, Heavy Duty Shockproof Case for iPad 10.2 Inch 2021/2020/2019, Black
features: 💥【Compatibility】: Protective Case for iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation 10.2 inch 2021/2020/2019 released, Model (A2602, A2603, A2604, A2605, A2270, A2428, A2429, A2430, A2197, A2198, A2200).

💥【Full Body Protection Case with Screen Protector】: This Case for iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation 10.2'' is made up with built-in screen protector, hard plastic frame and soft silicone bumper. Heavy Duty Protection Shockproof design to keep your tablet from damages caused by accidental drops, shocks, bumps or scratches.

💥【360° Rotating / Foldable Stand】: The built-in stand supports 180-degree folding and 360-degree rotation, providing stable support for your tablet and a more flexible and comfortable angle for viewing, typing, and drawing. It also allows you to hold the tablet safely and comfortably with one hand and use it at any angle, very convenient to use during meetings, work or travel.

💥【Multifunctional Shoulder Strap & Built-in Pencil Holder】: The shoulder strap is adjustable and detachable, both kids and adults can use it to carry case for iPad 9th/8th/7th generation for outdoor activities. Built-in pencil holder helps store your pencil so it's always available when you need it.

☎【Service】: SEYMAC stock Case for iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation 10.2'' comes with a 6-month warranty and lifetime technical support. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we are here to help!
